name: Range Hand
notes: Bow + Marksman — Aimed Shot, Steady Aim, Steady Hand (+1 ACC ranged). ACC/STR trained; leather armour. Level 5 starter (5) — max learnable tier at Lv5 is 2 (tier 3 opens Lv8). Spent 112 Lumens (44 skills + 68 stats) and 1550 Gil on gear. Banked 1 Lumens after creation.

name: Alley Cutpurse
notes: Dagger + Thief — Sneak Attack, Light Step, Light Fingers. ACC/STR trained for table combat, not HP padding. Level 5 starter (5) — max learnable tier at Lv5 is 2 (tier 3 opens Lv8). Spent 112 Lumens (44 skills + 68 stats) and 1050 Gil on gear. Banked 1 Lumens after creation.

name: Apprentice Evoker
notes: Staff + Mage — Staff Strike, Mana Focus, Arcane Study support. ACC/MAG trained; leather for survival. Level 5 starter (5) — max learnable tier at Lv5 is 2 (tier 3 opens Lv8). Spent 112 Lumens (44 skills + 68 stats) and 1400 Gil on gear. Banked 1 Lumens after creation.

name: Road Knight
notes: Sword + Soldier — basics, Quick Strike, and Soldier Training (+1 STR in medium armour). ACC/STR trained; modest HP. Level 5 starter (5) — max learnable tier at Lv5 is 2 (tier 3 opens Lv8). Spent 112 Lumens (44 skills + 68 stats) and 1350 Gil on gear. Banked 1 Lumens after creation.
